question: How do I open a bank account?
answer: To open a bank account with NovaBank, log in to your account and navigate to the Accounts page. Click 'New Account', choose your account type (Checking, Savings, Business, Credit, Investment, or Fixed Deposit), select your currency, and make an initial deposit. Your account will be created and activated shortly.

question: What types of accounts does NovaBank offer?
answer: NovaBank offers 6 types of accounts: Checking (everyday transactions with 0.5% APY), Savings (high-yield savings with 4.5% APY), Business (for commercial use with 2.0% APY), Credit (line of credit), Investment (trading and portfolio management with 6.0% APY), and Fixed Deposit (term deposits with 7.0% APY).

question: How do I check my account balance?
answer: You can check your account balance from the Dashboard or Accounts page. Your available balance (funds you can use immediately) and current balance (total funds including holds) are displayed. You can also see individual account balances by clicking on any account card.

question: How do I transfer money between accounts?
answer: To transfer money, go to the Transactions page and click 'Send Money'. Select the source account, enter the destination account ID, specify the amount and currency, add an optional description, and confirm. The transfer is processed in real-time and you'll see the updated balances immediately.

question: What is the maximum transfer amount?
answer: NovaBank allows transfers up to $10,000,000 (or equivalent in other currencies) per transaction. For amounts over $50,000, additional security verification may be required. Daily transfer limits may apply based on your account tier.

question: Can I reverse a transfer?
answer: Yes, completed transactions can be reversed. Go to the transaction details and use the 'Reverse' option. The reversal will transfer the funds back from the destination to the source account. Reversals are subject to fund availability in the destination account.

question: How does NovaBank protect my account?
answer: NovaBank uses bank-grade 256-bit encryption for all data. We implement JWT-based authentication with access and refresh tokens, Redis-backed session management, account lockout after 5 failed attempts, and optional two-factor authentication. All API requests are rate-limited and validated.

question: What should I do if I see unauthorized transactions?
answer: If you notice any unauthorized transactions, immediately change your password from the Settings page and contact NovaBank Support. Our fraud detection system monitors transactions in real-time and may flag suspicious activity automatically.

question: How can I apply for a loan?
answer: NovaBank offers various loan products including personal loans, home mortgages, and business loans. You can start your application from the Loans section in your dashboard. Our AI-powered loan approval system will analyze your financial profile and provide a decision within minutes.

question: What investment options are available?
answer: NovaBank provides investment accounts for trading stocks, ETFs, bonds, and mutual funds. Our AI Financial Advisor can help create a personalized investment portfolio based on your risk tolerance and financial goals. We offer investment accounts with competitive 6.0% APY returns.

question: How do I contact customer support?
answer: You can reach NovaBank customer support via the AI Chat Assistant available 24/7 on your dashboard for immediate answers. For complex issues, email us at support@novabank.com or call 1-800-NOVABANK. Our support team is available Monday to Saturday, 8 AM to 10 PM EST.

question: How do I manage my debit/credit cards?
answer: Card management features are available in the Cards section. You can view your virtual and physical cards, set spending limits, enable/disable international transactions, report lost or stolen cards, and request PIN changes in real-time.

question: How is interest calculated on my savings?
answer: Interest on savings accounts is calculated daily and credited monthly at the end of each statement period. Our Savings account offers 4.5% APY, while Fixed Deposits earn up to 7.0% APY depending on the term length. You can track your interest earnings in the account details.

question: What fees does NovaBank charge?
answer: NovaBank believes in transparent banking. There are no monthly maintenance fees for Checking and Savings accounts. Wire transfers have a nominal fee of $25 domestic and $45 international. ATM withdrawals beyond 5 free transactions per month incur a $2 fee. Overdraft protection has a $35 fee per occurrence.

question: How can I improve my financial health?
answer: NovaBank's AI Insights can help! We recommend: 1) Maintain at least 3-6 months of expenses in your Savings account, 2) Set up automatic transfers to savings each payday, 3) Monitor your spending categories monthly, 4) Diversify your investments across different asset classes, and 5) Review and adjust your budget quarterly.
